component.name: Glotze
component.summary: Search and download from German public broadcaster Mediatheken

description.p: Glotze is a GNOME-native desktop client for searching videos across ARD, ZDF, 3sat, arte and the other German public broadcasters via the MediathekViewWeb API. Episodes can be downloaded to the local Videos folder for offline viewing.
Playback and streaming are intentionally out of scope — Glotze hands you the file and steps out of the way.
Initial milestone: search MediathekViewWeb, pick quality, download to ~/Videos.
